[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110010 4
1 0011101 4
2 0111000 3
3 1100100 3
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 1011011 5
7 0011001 3

01 10 0011001 3 match 7
12 21 0000000 a match 4 5
23 32 0100010 2
34 43 1110010 4 match 0
45 54 0010000 1
56 65 0011000 2
67 76 0100000 1
70 07 1000000 1

02 20 0000010 1
13 31 0010000 1
24 42 0100010 2
35 53 0010000 1
46 64 0110000 2
57 75 0000100 1
60 06 0011000 2
71 17 0000000 a match 4 5

03 30 1010010 3
14 41 0010000 1
25 52 0000000 a match 4 5
36 63 0110000 2
47 74 1100000 2
50 05 0011001 3 match 7
61 16 0011000 2
72 27 0100000 1

04 40 1010010 3
15 51 0011001 3 match 7
26 62 0100000 1
37 73 1100000 2
